problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
